hero.subtitle: Connecting skilled laborers with the opportunities for a better future.

about.label: About
about.desc: Majdoor Mitra is dedicated to improving the lives of laborers by connecting them with employers who need manpower. We strive to provide reliable job opportunities, fair wages, and a support system for better working conditions.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Bridging the Gap Between Workers and Employers
services.s1Desc: Find skilled workers or discover the opportunities that match your talents.
services.s2Desc: Digital profiles to showcase skills and connect directly with those in need.
services.s3Desc: Intelligent matching that prioritizes workers and jobs in your immediate neighborhood.
services.s4Desc: Access to essential labor resources, documentation, and digital support services.

list.quote: Majdoor Mitra helped me find steady work and better pay. It's easy to use and really takes care of us workers.
list.name: Rahul Kumar

list.quote: I used to wait at the naka for hours. Now I get calls directly on my phone. Majdoor Mitra changed my life.
list.name: Sanjay Singh

list.quote: Finding reliable work in new colonies was hard. This app helped me connect with good families nearby.
list.name: Anita Devi

list.quote: The rating system helps me get more work. Good work is finally being rewarded with more opportunities.
list.name: Vikram

footer.tagline: Connecting skilled blue-collar workers with right opportunities across Bharat.

register.title: Join MajdoorMitra
register.subtitle: Create an account to start your journey

contact.heroSubtitle: Have questions or need support? We're here to help workers and contractors connect with the right resources.
contact.formDesc: Whether you're a worker looking for jobs, a contractor seeking skilled labour, or have a suggestion — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact.alertSent: Message Sent! We will get back to you soon.
contact.faq1Q: How do I register as a worker?
contact.faq1A: Simply click Register, choose "Labour", fill in your details and your primary skill — it takes less than 2 minutes.
contact.faq2Q: Is there any fee to use MajdoorMitra?
contact.faq2A: Registration and matching are currently 100% free for all users. In the future, we may introduce a subscription-based model for premium features.
contact.faq3A: Majdoor Mitra is a Pan-India digital platform. Our matching system is designed to serve the entire nation, connecting Bharat's workforce across every city and region.
contact.loginRequired: Please login to send a message.
contact.fillRequired: Please fill required fields (Name, Email, Message).

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Connecting skilled workers with fair opportunities through technology, transparency, and trust.
aboutPage.whatDrivesDesc: Understanding the challenge and building the solution
aboutPage.missionDesc: To create a transparent, reliable, and accessible platform connecting skilled workers (majdoors) with contractors and homeowners across Bharat, ensuring fair wages and consistent work opportunities.
aboutPage.problemDesc: Millions of skilled labourers in India rely on daily wages and physical 'nakas' (crossroads) to find work. This process is inefficient, unpredictable, and often leads to exploitation by middlemen.
aboutPage.solutionDesc: MajdoorMitra digitalizes this process. By creating a unified digital platform, we enable direct communication between the demand and supply, fostering trust through ratings and verified profiles.
aboutPage.storyP1: Every day, millions of skilled workers across India stand at crossroads — physically and metaphorically. They wait at nakas for contractors who may never come, losing precious hours and income to uncertainty.
aboutPage.storyP2: MajdoorMitra was born from witnessing this firsthand. We built a platform where a plumber in Pune, an electrician in Delhi, or a mason in Chennai can find dignified work with a few taps on their phone.
aboutPage.trustworthyDesc: A reliable platform where you can connect with workers and contractors directly.
aboutPage.fairWagesDesc: Enjoy 100% direct communication and matching. We eliminate intermediaries so workers and contractors can connect without hidden fees or interference.
aboutPage.trustSafetyDesc: Built-in ratings, reviews, and dispute resolution create a safe ecosystem for everyone.
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Whether you're a skilled worker looking for opportunities or a contractor seeking reliable labour — MajdoorMitra is for you.
